instruction: A small Python utility in ~/Desktop/slug_tool/ is generating the wrong slug format. Read the bug report in BUG_REPORT.txt, open the Python string methods documentation in Chrome, and then use VS Code to fix slugify.py so the tests pass. When you are done, create ~/Desktop/slug_tool/FIX_DONE.txt containing exactly `slugify fixed`.

parameters.command:
python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
base = Path('/home/user/Desktop/slug_tool')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
(base / 'BUG_REPORT.txt').write_text('The slug should use lowercase words joined by hyphens, not underscores.\n')
(base / 'slugify.py').write_text("""def slugify(text):
    return text.strip().lower().replace(' ', '_')
""")
(base / 'test.py').write_text("""from slugify import slugify

def test():
    assert slugify(' Hello World ') == 'hello-world'
    assert slugify('Data Science Notes') == 'data-science-notes'
""")
PY
